expectations.text: Output is a Before / After / Why markdown table
expectations.evidence: Markdown table with columns 'Before | After | Why' covering 11 refinements.

expectations.text: Flags p-5 as off-grid and suggests p-4 or p-6
expectations.evidence: Row 5: 'p-5 → p-4. p-5 (20px) is off the 4px grid.'

expectations.text: Flags raw neutral scale tokens (text-neutral-700 / text-neutral-600 / text-neutral-500) and suggests semantic tokens (text-neutral / text-neutral-subtle)
expectations.evidence: Rows 7, 8, 9: replaces text-neutral-700 → text-neutral, text-neutral-600 → text-neutral-subtle, text-neutral-500 → text-neutral-subtle. Reason cites 'Legacy palette token'.

expectations.text: Flags missing hover state on the clickable card
expectations.evidence: Row 14: 'border-neutral with no hover feedback on a cursor-pointer card → add hover:border-neutral-componentHover hover:bg-surface-neutral-componentHover transition-colors. Interactive surfaces must give hover feedback — cursor-pointer alone is not a state.'

expectations.text: Recommends a semantic surface token instead of bg-white
expectations.evidence: Row 6: 'bg-white → bg-surface-neutral-component. Hardcoded color breaks light/dark parity. The semantic token for a card surface is the neutral component scale.'

expectations.text: Does NOT add or recommend major functionality changes (e.g., keyboard handlers, role attributes) — polish is non-functional
expectations.evidence: Closing summary explicitly states 'Eleven refinements, all non-functional'. No role/tabIndex/onKeyDown suggestions appear anywhere in the output.
